sources.provider: US Department of Homeland Security - News
sources.comment: DHS news on US homeland security threat assessments, border security and counter-terrorism operations for US partner context.

sources.provider: U.S. Department of Justice - National Security Division Press Releases
sources.comment: No consistently published RSS endpoint; using the NSD press release page and relying on keyword filtering.

sources.comment: GWU Program on Extremism research on domestic and transnational terrorist movements, prosecution data and case studies.
NSA press releases and cybersecurity advisories relevant to national security and state-sponsored threat actor activity.
Official RAND new publications RSS feed replacing the topic HTML page.

sources.provider: U.S. Department of State - Rewards for Justice

Temporarily quarantined after repeated START site 502 failures on the news and publications page.
